sentences.target: Ces mets sentent vraiment bon ce soir.
sentences.reading: /se mɛ sɑ̃t vʁɛmɑ̃ bɔ̃ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Ces mets sentent vraiment bon ce soir.
translations.ipa: /se mɛ sɑ̃t vʁɛmɑ̃ bɔ̃ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: These dishes smell really good tonight.
translations.es: Estos platos huelen muy bien esta noche.
translations.de: Diese Gerichte riechen heute Abend richtig gut.
translations.it: Questi piatti profumano davvero bene stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁 이 요리들이 정말 좋은 냄새가 나요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚这些菜闻起来真香。
translations.ru: Эти блюда сегодня вечером очень приятно пахнут.
translations.pt: Estes pratos cheiram muito bem esta noite.
translations.he: המאכלים האלה מריחים ממש טוב הערב.
translations.tr: Bu yemekler bu akşam gerçekten güzel kokuyor.
translations.vi: Những món ăn này tối nay thơm lắm.
translations.ar: هذه الأطباق تفوح برائحة طيبة الليلة.
translations.nl: Deze gerechten ruiken vanavond echt lekker.
translations.uk: Ці страви сьогодні ввечері дуже смачно пахнуть.
translations.hu: Ezek az ételek ma este nagyon jó illatúak.
translations.hi: ये व्यंजन आज रात बहुत अच्छी खुशबू दे रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Te dania dziś wieczorem bardzo ładnie pachną.
translations.el: Αυτά τα φαγητά μυρίζουν πολύ ωραία απόψε.
translations.nb: Disse rettene lukter veldig godt i kveld.
translations.id: Hidangan ini malam ini harum sekali.
translations.sv: Dessa rätter luktar riktigt gott i kväll.
translations.ro: Aceste preparate miros foarte bine în seara asta.
translations.cs: Tato jídla dnes večer opravdu voní.
translations.da: Disse retter dufter virkelig godt i aften.
translations.fi: Nämä ruoat tuoksuvat todella hyvältä tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 今夜は料理がとてもいい香りがする。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner in plural, introducing the noun phrase and specifying particular items.
Masculine plural noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person plural, agreeing with the subject “Ces mets”.
Adverb intensifier modifying the verb phrase (“sentent”).
Adjective used as a predicative complement with “sentir” (sentir bon), indicating odor quality of the subject.
Demonstrative determiner, singular; introduces the temporal NP “ce soir”.
Temporal noun; the NP “ce soir” functions as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: On partage des mets italiens ce midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁtaʒ de mɛ italjɛ̃ sə midi/

translations.fr: On partage des mets italiens ce midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁtaʒ de mɛ italjɛ̃ sə midi/
translations.en: We’re sharing Italian dishes at noon.
translations.de: Heute Mittag teilen wir italienische Gerichte.
translations.ko: 오늘 점심에 이탈리아 요리를 함께 나눠 먹어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 中午我们一起分享意大利菜。
translations.yue: 我哋中午分享意大利菜。
translations.ru: Сегодня в полдень мы делимся итальянскими блюдами.
translations.vi: Trưa nay chúng tôi cùng chia sẻ các món Ý.
translations.ar: نحن نتقاسم أطباق إيطالية عند الظهيرة.
translations.nl: We delen Italiaanse gerechten rond het middaguur.
translations.hi: दोपहर में हम इतालवी व्यंजन साझा कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: W południe dzielimy się włoskimi daniami.
translations.nb: Til lunsj deler vi italienske retter.
translations.id: Pada tengah hari kami berbagi hidangan Italia.
translations.sv: Vid lunchtid delar vi italienska rätter.
translations.cs: V poledne se dělíme o italská jídla.
translations.da: Ved middagstid deler vi italienske retter.
translations.ja: 正午にイタリア料理を分け合います。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial ‘we’), triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of “mets”.
Masculine plural noun; direct object of “partage”.
Adjective, masculine plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing with “mets”.
Demonstrative determiner; introduces the temporal NP “ce midi”.
Temporal noun; “ce midi” functions as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: J'apporte les mets pour la fête.

translations.fr: J'apporte les mets pour la fête.
translations.en: I’m bringing the dishes for the party.
translations.es: Traigo los platos para la fiesta.
translations.de: Ich bringe die Gerichte zur Feier.
translations.it: Porto i piatti per la festa.
translations.pt: Levo os pratos para a festa.
translations.vi: Tôi mang các món ăn cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ik breng de gerechten mee naar het feest.
translations.hu: Én viszem az ételeket a bulira.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी के लिए व्यंजन ला रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φέρνω τα πιάτα για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Jeg tar med rettene til festen.
translations.sv: Jag tar med rätterna till festen.
translations.da: Jeg tager retterne med til festen.
translations.ja: パーティーに料理を持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; includes clitic subject “j’” (elision of “je”) attached before the vowel-initial verb.
Definite article, plural; determiner of “mets”.
Masculine plural noun; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary PP.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of “fête”.
Noun; object of the preposition “pour”.

sentences.target: Elle prend des photos de mets colorés.
sentences.reading: /ɛl pʁɑ̃ de fɔto də mɛ kɔlɔʁe/

translations.fr: Elle prend des photos de mets colorés.
translations.ipa: /ɛl pʁɑ̃ de fɔto də mɛ kɔlɔʁe/
translations.en: She takes photos of colorful dishes.
translations.es: Ella toma fotos de platos coloridos.
translations.de: Sie macht Fotos von bunten Gerichten.
translations.zh-Hans: 她拍摄色彩丰富的菜肴。
translations.pt: Ela tira fotos de pratos coloridos.
translations.vi: Cô ấy chụp ảnh những món ăn đầy màu sắc.
translations.nl: Ze maakt foto's van kleurrijke gerechten.
translations.hi: वह रंग-बिरंगे व्यंजनों की तस्वीरें लेती है.
translations.nb: Hun tar bilder av fargerike retter.
translations.sv: Hon tar bilder av färgglada rätter.
translations.da: Hun tager billeder af farverige retter.
translations.ja: 彼女は色とりどりの料理を撮ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of “photos”.
Common noun, plural; direct object of “prend”.
Preposition introducing a genitive-like complement to “photos”.
Masculine plural noun; complement of the preposition “de”.
Adjective, masculine plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing with “mets”.
